div1.entryFree: Gentle, subst. (cf. adj. def. 2) in the plur. --s, == gentlefolks, gentlemen, persons of good birth: the --s are at their game, LLL IV, 2, 172. Mostly used as a familiar compellation: Wiv. III, 2, 92. LLL II, 225. Shr. III, 2, 95. Especially in addressing an audience: Mids. V, 128. Mids. V, 128 Mids. V, 128. II Chor. Mids. V, 128
